summary: The Alley Boss confronts and decisively defeats a group of players who were engaging in aggressive PK tactics. After dismantling the team, he shares the looted items with his companions and moves on to his next objective. Meanwhile, rival guilds observe the Alley Boss's overwhelming skill with a mix of fear and professional interest.
key_moments: The Alley Boss ambushes and eliminates a group of PK players.
The Alley Boss distributes rare and unique loot among his team members.
Rival guild members watch footage of the fight and acknowledge the Alley Boss's superior power level.
